forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the Barossa Valley. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 13.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly in the north. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Cloudy. Light winds.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Sun protection 11:40am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 22.
